low/beneath/to lower (one's head)/to let droop/to hang down/to incline

how (wonderful etc)/what (a great idea etc)/however (difficult it may be etc)/(in interrogative sentences) how (much etc)/to what extent
(not only ...) but also/moreover; in addition; furthermore
to have a high temperature (from illness); to have a fever/(fig.) to be fascinated with; to obsess over/(fig.) flourishing; thriving; popular
